actual_household_coverage_share.rationale: Base centered at the 99% commitment per the actual-vs-commitment default. Asymmetric downside captures Risk 1 (2–5% drop on satellite-hub failure) compounded by Risk 6 (5–10% fluid-population undercount); upside capped by mathematical near-ceiling.

actual_total_cost_crore.rationale: Base centered at the ₹15,000 crore committed ceiling — the Pioneer's Gambit envelope is sized to be spent. Low anchored on the plan's stated ₹12,000 crore minimum; upside captures Expert Criticism's 15% satellite-fee-runaway overrun scenario.

actual_provisional_release_months.rationale: Base centered at the 6-month commitment per the actual-vs-commitment default. Asymmetric upside captures Risk 2 (state non-cooperation pushes Phase-2 aggregation +2-3 months) and JRB-arbitration-overrun stress test; downside reflects best-case fast aggregation.

actual_ingestion_mttr_hours.rationale: Base centered at the 4-hour Issue-3 target per the actual-vs-commitment default. Asymmetric upside captures the Issue-3 stress-test scenario where MTTR breaches force 10-day supervisor-review delay and 2-week pay delay; downside reflects modern hyperscale cloud headroom.

actual_device_audit_failure_share.rationale: Base centered at the 1% Decision-7 penalty trigger as the de-facto commitment ceiling — the supervisory metric is calibrated to keep actuals at-or-below this. Asymmetric upside captures Risk 5 (10% device loss) propagating into the audit-failure metric.
